text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, I hear a knock on the door of the training staff
office.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
choice_data_list: I'm very glad to see you, Dober.
Of course I am, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Um, is what you said before still true? Are you still willing to support
me?
choice_data_list: I'm very glad to see you, Dober.
Of course I am, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-it's nothing too deep. I just want to win. I need to do this...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much. Then, well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So please. Can you help me win?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: If you don't mind... Please help me win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: This next scrimmage is my last chance to offer up a win to Trainer.
choice_data_list: We'll win it—together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thus begins a fair few days of intense training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thus begins a fair few days of intense training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She certainly has what it takes to be an excellent runner, and her
improvement day-to-day is tangible. Some worries linger, however.
choice_data_list: That was a great time, Dober.
That was a great time, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh? But still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I felt like that was one of my best too. But still...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried about not being able to replicate these kinds of results in
front of a crowd.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried about not being able to replicate these kinds of results in
front of a crowd.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm going to go for another. Please time me again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having shared her thoughts, she takes off once again. It seems like
mental roadblocks are quite deep-rooted.
choice_data_list: If only I could do something... anything....

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Seeing her continue to give it her all, a thought occurs to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even before I took over main training duties, I've noticed one thing
about the way she runs down the track.
choice_data_list:
(She never really looks at the stands, does
she?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, no, but isn't that normal? When I'm running, I just want to focus
on the track.
choice_data_list:
You may be making too much of an effort to
not look at them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps thinking too much about not looking at the stands is causing
a break in her overall concentration.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Th-that's...
choice_data_list: Let's try something out before the scrimmage.
Let's try something out before the scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What... do you want to try?
choice_data_list:
Even if it's just for a second, why don't you try
looking towards the spectators?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?! I-I can't do that... I'm just so—
choice_data_list: I'll be right there, cheering you on.
I'll be right there, cheering you on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: B-but!
choice_data_list:
I'll be cheering on a runner I have complete
faith in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the scrimmage race finally arrives.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Just look at all these people!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's undoubtedly due to the rumors of that famous trainer's retirement.
There are likely many trainers looking to scout Dober themselves.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Even though it is known that she still encounters some difficulties, she is still a Mejiro after all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I guess so... Will she be okay, though? She's been pushing herself way
too hard, and I'm worried that she's going to get hurt.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Ryan, I don't think you should worry. She will definitely be
okay.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Right. I can tell just by looking at her that something is different
today.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text: Bell...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer... She's definitely come to see me today, right? I want to win.
I want to win! I want to win for her today!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (But... It's all the same... My heartbeat is overwhelmingly loud...)
choice_data_list: Dober, over here!
Dober, over here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Ah... I looked... Right toward the spectators...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Over there...)
choice_data_list: It's okay, Dober! You're a strong runner!
It's okay, Dober! You're a strong runner!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What're you yelling out... Dummy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: She really... believes in me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's about to begin—the final race in which Mejiro Dober's chief
trainer can preside over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's about to begin—the final race in which Mejiro Dober's chief
trainer can preside over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clank!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(My heartbeat is still so loud... I still don't think I'm able to run
exactly like I do while training.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I hate being the center of attention. Their shouts, their cheers, the
very sense of their presence... I don't want to look over at those who
are laughing at me...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But still... Haaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (But still! There are some over there who do truly believe in me!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm strong... I'm capable and strong!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm a strong Umamusumeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
First place... Bell, that was a marvelous race. I'm so happy for you,
and now—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Thank you very much for coming today.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm the one who should be thanking you! I'm so happy to have been able to see you win. Now nothing lingers on my mind before I retire.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, wait, that's a lie. There is one thing. Bell, what do you plan to do
now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I plan to keep training with our assistant trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You won't say "no" after all this, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Is that okay... with you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the retiring woman's good graces, I complete the contract to
become Mejiro Dober's new trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the retiring woman's good graces, I complete the contract to
become Mejiro Dober's new trainer.
